annotations.annotation: Regulations .01—.10 adopted as an emergency provision effective July 2, 2010 (37:16 Md. R. 1059); adopted permanently effective October 4, 2010 (37:20 Md. R. 1395)
Regulation .03 amended effective April 16, 2012 (39:7 Md. R. 495)
Regulation .04 amended effective April 16, 2012 (39:7 Md. R. 495)
Regulation .08 amended effective April 16, 2012 (39:7 Md. R. 495)
Regulation .09A amended effective April 16, 2012 (39:7 Md. R. 495)
Regulation .09B amended effective June 27, 2011 (38:13 Md. R. 756)
Regulation .11 adopted effective April 16, 2012 (39:7 Md. R. 495)
Chapter repealed as an emergency provision effective March 1, 2013 (40:7 Md. R. 608)
